title: A lit up UFO spotted by an airplane pilot over Aracaju [2007]
excerpt: MAY 11th, 2007. Communicated to CINDACTA 03 [Integrated Center for Air Defense and Air Traffic Control] at 9:20 pm. Under a clear sky and under good visibility conditions, when approaching the Aracaju Airport [State of Sergipe], the pilot of flight VARIG2343 reported seeing an unidentified flying object with the aspect of an intense light, a […]
text_preview: MAY 11th, 2007. Communicated to CINDACTA 03 [Integrated Center for Air Defense and Air Traffic Control] at 9:20 pm. Under a clear sky and under good visibility conditions, when approaching the Aracaju Airport [State of Sergipe], the pilot of flight VARIG2343 reported seeing an unidentified flying object with the aspect of an intense light, a “lighthouse”, flying almost in the opposite direction of his descending aircraft. According to the witness, the UFO was at an altitude of 34,000ft. The pilot did not report any interference, traces or trails left by the object in its flight, or even the UF
summary: On May 11, 2007 the crew of VARIG2343 approaching Aracaju, SE reported an intense light UFO flying nearly opposite their direction at FL340, visible for 10–15 seconds.
